plan.failureSummary: The test failed because the expected URL 'https://www.checklyhq.com/docs/' did not match the actually received URL 'https://www.checklyhq.com/docs/what-is-checkly/' after navigating to the documentation homepage.
observedIndicators: Assertion mismatch detected in error details.
Assertions failed after successful page.ai execution.
Page.ai successfully completed navigation but landed on /docs/what-is-checkly/ instead of /docs/

remediationSteps.summary: Update the expected documentation landing URL assertion
remediationSteps.details: Update the test assertion on line 8 to expect 'https://www.checklyhq.com/docs/what-is-checkly/' instead of 'https://www.checklyhq.com/docs/'.

plan.notes: The page.ai instruction completed successfully and routed the user to the default developer documentation landing page. However, Checkly's main documentation URL now points to a more descriptive slug '/docs/what-is-checkly/' instead of the generic root directory '/docs/'. Updating the test assertion to accept the new URL will resolve this failure.
